title: Baruch and Letter of Jeremiah

title: Baruch and Letter of Jeremiah
text: This is the book of the words of Baruch the son of Nerias, the son of Maasias, the son of Sedecias, the son of Asadias, the son of Chelcias, whom Nabuchodonosor king of Babylon took captive...
